title: Apply Patch<T> to ChatContactSetInput and SpaceUpdateInput
description:
ChatContactSetInput:
  Option<Option<&'a str>> display_name -> Patch<&'a str>
  Option<Option<&'a str>> nick         -> Patch<&'a str>

SpaceUpdateInput:
  Option<Option<&'a str>> description  -> Patch<&'a str>
  Option<Option<&'a str>> icon_blob_id -> Patch<&'a str>

Update chat_contact_set and space_set_update implementations. Update fixture tests.
